news.headline: PNC received 2024 CCAR results with estimated minimum capital. Federal Reserve disclosed SCB for PNC.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 28, 2024, The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) disclosed receiving the Federal Reserve's 2024 Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR) results. The report outlined the Federal Reserve's projection of PNC's minimum capital requirements.

news.headline: 'Roaring Kitty's dog-related tweet boosts Chewy (CHWY) and Petco (WOOF) stock prices.'
BNY plans to raise quarterly common stock dividend by 12% to $0.47 per share, starting soon.
news.summary: Today, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY) revealed its plans to raise its quarterly cash dividend for common shares by 12% from $0.42 to $0.47 per share. This new dividend rate will take effect at the start of the upcoming period. BNY, a major player in the financial services sector, trades on the NYSE under the symbol BK.

news.headline: Stocks expected to drop by 30% amid looming recession in the U.S. economy, according to strategists.
Aptiv to announce Q2 2024 results on Aug 1, 2024, with investor call at 8:00 a.m. EDT hosted by Kevin Clark and Joseph Massaro.
news.summary: Dublin-based company Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV) is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on August 1, 2024. The scheduled investor call will take place at 8:00 a.m. EDT on the same day. Aptiv's Chairman and CEO, Kevin Clark, along with Vice Chairman and CFO, Joseph Massaro, will host the call. Those interested can access the live webcast and presentation materials through the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. Additionally, a replay of the call will be made available afterwards.

news.headline: Arrive AI's merger with Brüush (Nasdaq BRSH) hits snag, proposed triangular reverse merger scrapped, will not enter public market.
news.summary: Today on June 28, 2024, Indianapolis-based company Arrive AI revealed that its planned merger with Brüush (Nasdaq: BRSH) has hit a standstill. As a result, the proposed triangular reverse merger will not be the route through which Arrive AI will go public. The specific details regarding the next steps for Arrive AI were not disclosed.

news.headline: 40-year-old Supreme Court doctrine overturned, may benefit crypto firms. Legal experts optimistic.
news.summary: Legal experts have stated that the reversal of a long-standing Supreme Court doctrine, in place for 40 years, could empower struggling cryptocurrency businesses.

(NASDAQ: MCAA) terminated its Business Combination Agreement with FC Barcelona, which was initially dated August 11, 2023. This agreement had been amended and restated. Mountain & Co. I Acquisition Corp. is a publicly traded special acquisition company.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on June 28, 2024, Bank of America released a statement regarding the outcomes of the Federal Reserve's 2024 Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review (CCAR). They revealed intentions to raise their quarterly common stock dividend to $0.26 per share, starting in the upcoming third...

news.headline: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NaaS) complies with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement after receiving a notification letter.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NaaS), the primary U.S.-based EV charging service provider in China, disclosed the reception of a Compliance Notice from the Listing Qualifications Department. This marks a significant development for the company as it navigates its position in the market.

news.headline: Mountain & Barça end business agreement. Termination of Business Combination Agreement announced on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: In a joint announcement on June 28, 2024, Mountain & Co. I Acquisition Corp. (Mountain) and FC Barcelona (Barça) revealed the decision to end the Business Combination Agreement that was originally established on August 11, 2023. This termination marks a significant development in the collaboration between the two entities, with important implications for their future strategies and operations.

news.headline: Truist Financial Corp reveals 2024 CCAR results, plans to distribute capital & meet stress capital buffer requirement.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on June 28, 2024, Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) disclosed findings from its yearly company-conducted stress test as mandated by the Federal Reserve. This test assesses the company's resilience under adverse economic conditions.

news.headline: "EpicQuest Education receives Nasdaq notice due to minimum bid price deficiency. Provider of higher education for US, Canada, UK."
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, EpicQuest Education Group International Limited, a leading higher education provider for domestic and international students in the US, Canada, and the UK, revealed that they have received an undisclosed amount of funding. EpicQuest Education, listed as NASDAQ: EEIQ, continues to expand its educational services for a global audience.

(Nasdaq: LPSN), a leading tech company, announced that it has disclosed recent grants of equity-based incentive awards in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). These awards were issued under the LivePerson Inc. 2018 Inducement Plan. This news signifies the company's continued commitment to providing incentive opportunities to its employees.

news.headline: Stena RoRo orders 2 E-Flexer RoPax vessels from CMI Jinling, to be delivered in 2027 to Attica Group for Adriatic Sea operations.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden on June 28, 2024, Stena RoRo announced the procurement of two E-Flexer RoPax ships from the Chinese shipyard CMI Jinling (Weihai). These vessels are set to be handed over to Attica Group, a Greek shipping company, by 2027 for operations in the Adriatic Sea. This decision marks a significant addition for Stena in enhancing their fleet.

news.headline: Biden and Trump propose contrasting tax policies: Trump enforces 21% corp tax, lowers top earners tax to 37%. Biden to expire cuts for wealthy, keep for <$400k earners if re-elected.
news.summary: As the November election nears, President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump present contrasting tax policies for Americans post-January 2025. Trump plans to maintain the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, with a corporate tax rate of 21% and lowered taxes for top earners from 39.6% to 37%. This policy, expiring in 2025, also increased standard deductions to $14,600 for single filers and $29,200 for married filers. On the other hand, if re-elected, Biden intends to let Trump’s tax cuts for the wealthy lapse while preserving reductions for those earning under $400,000.

news.headline: Details on total voting rights and shares available.
Pyxis Oncology granted stock units and options to 5 new employees, totaling 89,530 shares and 111,913 options.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Pyxis Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: PYXS), a company specializing in advanced cancer treatments, announced that its Compensation Committee awarded 89,530 restricted stock units and 111,913 stock options to five new employees. These awards, granted under the Pyxis Oncology, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan, are considered vital inducements for the new hires to join the company. The grant date for these awards was June 28, 2024.

news.headline: United Community Banks, Inc. will release 2nd quarter financials on July 24, 2024 before market opens, with a conference call at 11:00 a.m. EST on the same day.
news.summary: In Greenville, South Carolina, on June 28, 2024, United Community Banks, Inc. (NASDAQ: UCBI) revealed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2024 on July 24, 2024, before the commencement of the stock market. Alongside the release, there will be a conference call taking place at 11:00 a.m. EST on the same day to delve into the financial results, key business achievements, and future projections.

news.headline: Cellectis held a shareholders meeting on June 28, 2024, to discuss its gene-editing platform.
news.summary: In New York on June 28, 2024, Cellectis, a biotechnology company traded on Euronext Growth (ALCLS) and Nasdaq (CLLS), held its shareholder general meeting at 2:30 p.m. CET at the Biopark auditorium in Paris, France. Cellectis focuses on utilizing gene-editing technology to create innovative cell and gene therapies for saving lives. The meeting took place at 11 rue Watt, 4th floor, 75013 Paris.

news.headline: ZW Data Action Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: CNET) reports full year 2023 audited financial results.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, ZW Data Action Technologies Inc. (ticker symbol: CNET) disclosed its audited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2023. The company, which offers online advertising, precision marketing, data analytics, and additional value-added services to corporate customers, made this announcement.

news.headline: Arbor Realty Trust declares dividends for Series D ($0.3984375), Series E & F ($0.390625 each) preferred stocks on July 30, 2024.
news.summary: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. declared cash dividends for its Series D, Series E, and Series F cumulative redeemable preferred stock on the NYSE as $0.3984375, $0.390625, and $0.390625 per share, respectively. These dividends, reflecting accrued amounts from April 30 to July 29, 2024, will be paid on July 30, 2024, to preferred stockholders of record on July 15, 2024.

news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Boston, John Hancock Hedged Equity & Income Fund (NYSE: HEQ), a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC, disclosed the sources of their information. The fund is subadvised by Wellington Management Company LLP.

news.headline: John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund announces monthly distribution sources of $0.0825 per share on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Boston, the John Hancock Premium Dividend Fund (NYSE: PDT), a closed-end fund overseen by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, revealed details regarding its monthly distribution amounting to $0.0825.

news.headline: John Hancock Financial Opportunities Fund (BTO) announces sources of quarterly distribution to shareholders.
news.summary: Today, in Boston on June 28, 2024, John Hancock Financial Opportunities Fund (NYSE: BTO), a closed-end fund managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC and subadvised by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, disclosed the details of its quarterly distribution of funds.

news.headline: NuCalm President Jim Poole receives prestigious President's Lifetime Achievement Award for 5,000 hours of service leadership.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on June 28, 2024, Jim Poole, the President and CEO of NuCalm®, received the esteemed President's Lifetime Achievement Award for his exceptional leadership. This recognition was given in appreciation of his dedicated service totaling 5,000 hours, which has impacted both domestic and international communities.

news.headline: Fonon Corp integrates AI with its BTS additive manufacturing for advanced 3D metal printing. Technology still in development.
news.summary: Fonon Corporation, based in Orlando, Florida, is a diverse holding company with expertise in R&D, equipment design, and manufacturing of cutting-edge laser material processing systems for both subtractive and additive manufacturing purposes. The company is emphasizing the advantages of its Bulk-To-Shape (BTS) additive manufacturing/3D metal printing technology when integrated with artificial intelligence (AI). The ongoing development of the BTS technology by Fonon indicates that it has not yet been completely introduced to the market.

news.headline: OneStream files for IPO with SEC, no set share price yet. Uncertainty on completion. Market-driven offering.
news.summary: A company based in Birmingham, Michigan, known as OneStream, Inc., has disclosed its submission of a Form S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for a potential initial public offering of its Class A common stock. There is no specific information available regarding the number of shares to be offered or the price range for the proposed offering as those details are pending determination. The company has noted that the completion of the offering is contingent on market conditions, leaving uncertainty regarding its success and potential timeframe for closure.

news.headline: Stocks struggle to recover, but Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq post modest losses; small-caps edge higher on Friday.
news.summary: On Friday, the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq experienced slight declines, while small-cap stocks saw marginal gains. The major indexes attempted to recover but ultimately ended lower.

news.headline: Bank deposits in the US increased to $17.612 trillion from $17.574 trillion last week.
No cash distribution for June to Pacific Coast Oil Trust holders based on April 2024 net profits. OTCT: ROYTL.
news.summary: In Houston, PACIFIC COAST OIL TRUST (OTC–ROYTL) shared news about no cash distribution to unit holders of record on June 28, 2024. This decision is based on the Trust's assessment of net profits from April 2024. The Trust, a royalty trust established by Pacific Coast Energy Company LP, made this determination in accordance with the Conveyance.

news.headline: PCS Edventures! reported financial results for fiscal year 2024, ending March 31. They are a top STEM education provider.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Boise, Idaho, PCS Edventures!, Inc. (PCSV), a top provider of K-12 Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) education programs, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year that closed on March 31, 2024.

news.headline: San Francisco's GRM Information Management adds app-driven banking and grocery delivery clients to VisualVault Platform.
news.summary: GRM Information Management has recently announced the expansion of its VisualVault Content Services Platform, with the addition of app-driven banking and grocery delivery clients from San Francisco. This development reflects an increase in clients utilizing GRM's services, especially in the tech and food industries. It demonstrates a trend towards digital document management solutions, with GRM positioning itself as a key player in this market. This move highlights the company's commitment to growth and innovation, catering to the evolving needs of its clients.

news.headline: Project Energy Reimagined Acquisition Corp. expects to close Business Combination by early July 2024 in Menlo Park, California.
news.summary: In Menlo Park, California on June 28, 2024, Project Energy Reimagined Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: PEGR) disclosed that its planned business merger with Heramba Electric plc (“Holdco”), Heramba Merger Corp., Heramba Limited, and Heramba GmbH ("Heramba") is expected to conclude in early July 2024. The agreement, established on October 2, 2023, is subject to meeting all necessary closing terms or receiving waivers for them.

news.headline: Eagle Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.45 per share cash dividend for Q2 2024, payable on July 31.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Eagle Bancorp, Inc. revealed a cash dividend of $0.45 per share for the second quarter of 2024. The dividend is set to be distributed on July 31, 2024, to shareholders of record as of July 20, 2024. Eagle Bancorp, Inc. is the parent company of EagleBank and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EGBN.

news.headline: Mobilicom receives Nasdaq bid price notification, as closing bid price was below $1 for 30 consecutive days.
news.summary: In Shoham, Israel, on June 28, 2024, Mobilicom Limited (Nasdaq: MOB, MOBBW), a company specializing in cybersecurity and solutions for drones and robotics, disclosed that it has received a notice from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC indicating non-compliance with the minimum bid price requirement. The notification stated that the closing bid price for the Company's American Depositary Shares (ADSs) fell below USD $1.00 for 30 consecutive trading days. As per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), listed securities must uphold a minimum bid price of USD $1.00 per share. Additionally, Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A) states that failing to meet this requirement for 30 consecutive business days constitutes a deficiency.

news.headline: Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE: KRG) upgraded by S&P to BBB with stable outlook.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Kite Realty Group Trust (NYSE: KRG) revealed that S&P Ratings raised the issuer credit rating for both Kite Realty Group Trust and its Operating Partnership, Kite Realty Group L.P., from 'BBB-' to 'BBB', maintaining a stable outlook.

news.headline: SIFCO Industries appoints George Scherff as CEO, effective July 8, 2024, replacing Peter Knapper who served since 2016.
news.summary: In Cleveland, a leading supplier of forged products to the aerospace, energy, and defense markets, SIFCO Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: SIF), announced the appointment of George Scherff as the new Chief Executive Officer ("CEO"), effective from July 8, 2024. This change comes as Peter Knapper, who held the position of President and CEO since 2016, disclosed his plan to retire this year. Bringing years of successful experience, Scherff steps into this significant role at a pivotal stage for the company.

news.headline: Company 79North plans to reprice warrants; exact numbers undisclosed.
Alexandria Real Estate Equities' 2023 CR Report shows 100% renewable energy in Greater Boston with a large-scale solar farm. Joined Moderna for a celebration.
news.summary: Alexandria has revealed that a newly constructed solar farm is currently delivering renewable energy to cover the entire electricity consumption of the Greater Boston area through a extended power purchase contract. The company commemorated this achievement alongside Moderna and the Governor of Massachusetts on June 26.

news.headline: Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. sets Q3 distribution schedule for July, August, and September 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. revealed its monthly distributions for the upcoming months. The Board of Directors declared the Fund’s distributions for July, August, and September 2024. The Fund's shares are listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RA.

news.headline: Tesla stock breaks out, BYD near 2024 highs, Q2 deliveries expected. BYD likely to retake BEV crown.
news.summary: Tesla has surged in value recently while BYD is approaching a potential entry point for investors. The second-quarter delivery figures are anticipated, with BYD expected to surpass in electric vehicle sales. This news of Tesla's stock breakout and BYD's nearing of their 2024 peak comes ahead of the impending Q2 delivery reports.

news.headline: Micron Technology, Inc. sees 50% growth in data center revenue in Q3 of fiscal 2024 due to high AI demand.
news.summary: Thus far, there has been a significant uptick in data center revenue driven by a 50% increase sequentially due to the rising demand for artificial intelligence (AI) technology. This surge marks a record high in the data center revenue mix.

news.headline: Public Storage releases 2024 Sustainability Report emphasizing 45% reduction target for scope 1 emissions.
news.summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) from Glendale, Calif., unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report emphasizing its commitment to sustainability. The report showcases the significant contribution of its diverse team, sustainable operations, and financial stability in ensuring long-term resilience, growth, and value creation. A notable achievement is setting a challenging 45% reduction target for scope 1 emissions. This demonstrates the company's proactive approach towards sustainability.
